params.name: Bronze Shiva Statue
params.description:
On Apr 28, 1100 AD, believers made this statue of God Shiva performing the Tandava dance.
Legends tell that Shiva's third eye can spray out a divine vital fire, and he has thousands of arms on his back. After the king of the Chola Dynasty, Rajaraja, conquered Ceylon and Kalinga, he was attacked and suffered heavy casualties. Furiously, he set out to punish the invaders. A ritual was performed, sacrifices were offered and Shiva appeared. From Shiva's third eye came a destructive force that ann …
